phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the ferry to Corsica
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je embarquer sur le ferry à destination de la Corse ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh am-bar-KAY soor leh FEH-ree ah des-tee-nah-SYON deh lah KORS
phrases.cultural_note: Regular ferries depart Nice for Bastia and Ajaccio in Corsica. The journey takes about 5–7 hours overnight.

responses.english: The terminal is at the end of the quay.
responses.phonetic: luh tair-mee-NAHL eh toh BOO doo KAY
responses.french: Le terminal est au bout du quai.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the fishing boats are selling
phrases.text_local: Que vendent les pêcheurs depuis leurs bateaux ce matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: keh VAN-dan lay pay-SHUHR deh-PWEE luhr bah-TOH seh mah-TAN
phrases.cultural_note: Local fishermen still sell their daily catch directly from the boat on the quayside — very early morning only.

responses.phonetic: doo pwah-SOHN FRAY pay-SHAY suh mah-TAHN
responses.french: Du poisson frais, pêché ce matin.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if boat tours of the bay are available from the port
phrases.text_local: Des excursions en bateau dans la baie sont-elles proposées depuis le port ?
phrases.pronunciation: day zek-skoor-SYON an bah-TOH dan lah BAY son-TEL pro-po-ZAY deh-PWEE leh POR
phrases.cultural_note: Several operators offer bay cruises and boat trips to Monaco and Antibes from the old port.

responses.english: Yes, departures are from the main quay.
responses.phonetic: wee lay day-PAR sohn toh KAY prahn-see-PAHL
responses.french: Oui, les départs sont au quai principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a table at a portside restaurant with a view of the boats
phrases.text_local: Auriez-vous une table avec vue sur les bateaux, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oh-RYAY voo oon TAB-leh ah-VEK vyoo soor lay bah-TOH seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The quais surrounding Port Lympia are lined with restaurants — Quai Lunel on the south side has the best views.

responses.english: There are terrace seats over there.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day PLAHSS ahn tay-RASS lah-BAH
responses.french: Il y a des places en terrasse, là-bas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the port market opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence le marché du port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR ko-MANS leh mar-SHAY doo POR
phrases.cultural_note: A small morning market near the port sells fresh fish and local produce — best visited before 9am.
